headline: AI Chips Update - NVIDIA and Wowza Tackle Synthetic Video Threats Globally
summary: Wowza has announced the deployment of a groundbreaking synthetic video detection solution integrated with NVIDIA's Synthetic Video Detector (SVD). This integration provides real-time AI-generated video detection capabilities across more than 35,000 of Wowza's video deployments globally, utilizing existing NVIDIA infrastructure. As synthetic video poses increasing threats in media, government, public safety, and financial sectors, NVIDIA's SVD offers a solution that can identify AI-engineered...

headline: Oil prices rise another 2%, while AI stocks get back to falling
summary: Stocks of computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are turning back lower Wednesday and weighing on Wall Street.  Oil prices, meanwhile, rose another 2% as fighting continues in the war with Iran.  The S&P 500 fell 0.2%, even though most of the stocks within it rose.

content.title: Oil prices rise another 2%, while AI stocks get back to falling
content.summary: Stocks of computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are turning back lower Wednesday and weighing on Wall Street.  Oil prices, meanwhile, rose another 2% as fighting continues in the war with Iran.  The S&P 500 fell 0.2%, even though most of the stocks within it rose.
